heading: Funding for laboratory directed research and development
label: 6333 Funding for laboratory directed research and development
text: Notwithstanding section 307 of the Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2010 (; ), of the funds made available by the Department of Energy for activities at Government-owned, contractor-operated laboratories funded in the Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2014 (div. D of ) or any subsequent Energy and Water Development Appropriations Act for any fiscal year, the Secretary may authorize a specific amount, not to exceed 6 percent of such funds, to be used by such laboratories for laboratory directed research and development.Public Law 111–85123 Stat. 2845Pub. L. 113–76
